nodes.title: Making a Difference in San Antonio: SA YES
Register Now for the January 25th Charity Texas Poker Tournament – Over $40,000 in Prizes
The PM Group Turns 30: SA YES – Supplying Childhood Success

pageContext.content:
Are you ready for your chance to win your choice of a truck while helping more than 15,000 students at Title 1 Elementary schools in our community be ready to succeed this upcoming school year? SA YES is hosting the annual Drive Away for Education Truck Raffle sponsored by the Ancira Auto Group. All raffle ticket sales will fund the purchase of school supply kits that are distributed each year in San Antonio.

Visit sayes.org to purchase your tickets by midnight on August 2nd. Tickets are 1 for $25, 3 for $50, or 10 for $100. The winner will be announced during the 10pm news on WOAI-TV on Wednesday, August 5, 2020, and will get their choice of one of five trucks. The winner will be responsible for tax, title, license, and federal tax withholdings on the raffle winnings.

SA YES works tirelessly to support the children in our communities by providing school supply kits and classroom grants to give students the tools necessary to excel in the classroom. The organization’s support recently extended beyond the classroom when COVID-19 kept students at home with their families as they finish out the 2019 school year. To address this need, A YES provided a list of at-home resources for parents and students and kept their “Little Locker” stocked with books and art supplies. Through these initiatives, SA YES encouraged students to keep learning and stay active outside. None of this would be possible without the continued support from generous donors, event attendees, and participants in raffles like the Drive Away for Education Truck Raffle. Please visit the link above to show your support!

About The PM Group: The PM Group was founded in 1988. For over 31 years, the agency has continued to grow and is San Antonio’s largest advertising agency. The PM Group’s client roster spans numerous industries including automotive, CPG, entertainment and sports marketing, legal, business services, non-profit, real estate and fitness. In addition, the agency hosts an annual Charity Gala that to date has raised millions of dollars for local San Antonio area non-profit organizations in the last 15 years! In the past 10 years, The PM Group has raised both directly and indirectly over $12 million for these charities. It is our way of giving back to the community that we so humbly serve.
